'''Caulfmar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Brolf]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] sent [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] to deliver files to him. Doriana used this trip as an excuse to stir up trouble on Barlok.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
